sections.title: Analytics
items: Traffic delta vs last cycle (2026-04-09-standup-v8): flat, no material shifts in top pages
Tool pages (DCA calculator, gas tracker) continue to lead sessions; compare pages remain top conversion surface

No pages lost rankings or dropped out of index

No production incidents; build remains green
